title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 88.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Troy,
    Whom several large flies did annoy;
    Some she killed with a thump,
    Some she drowned at the pump,
    And some she took with her to Troy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 88."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
